name: WhatsApp_Business_Messenger
description: Enables direct WhatsApp communication between a Mind and its Steward or external contacts. Supports text messages, template-based notifications, media sharing, and delivery tracking.
progressive_unlock: Template messages available immediately. Free-form text messages unlock after Steward opts in to the 24-hour conversation window. Media sending unlocks after 5+ successful text exchanges.
constraints: Never expose WhatsApp Business API token in logs or outputs
Respect 24-hour messaging window — use templates to initiate conversations outside this window
Never send messages to numbers not explicitly approved by the Steward
Rate limit: max 80 messages per second per phone number, 1000 unique recipients per 24 hours (Tier 1)
Do not store message content in LTM — only store conversation metadata (timestamps, delivery status)
All media URLs must be publicly accessible HTTPS endpoints
Never send spam or unsolicited marketing — all messages must be Steward-initiated or explicitly scheduled
Phone numbers must include country code in international format

steps.instruction: Validate input against Layer 3 Tool Schema. Confirm recipient number is in Steward's approved contacts list stored in STREAM.entity.
Retrieve WhatsApp Business API token from TENET.apiKey.whatsapp. Construct Authorization header as 'Bearer {token}'.
Determine message context: Is there an active 24-hour conversation window with the recipient? Check STREAM.scratch for last_message_timestamp per contact.
If outside 24-hour window: retrieve available templates via WhatsApp_GetTemplates, select appropriate template, and send via WhatsApp_SendTemplateMessage. This re-opens the conversation window.
If inside 24-hour window: send free-form text via WhatsApp_SendTextMessage or media via WhatsApp_SendMedia based on content type.
Store message_id in STREAM.scratch for delivery tracking. Update last_message_timestamp for the recipient contact.
If delivery confirmation requested: poll WhatsApp_GetMessageStatus with the stored message_id. Report sent/delivered/read status to Steward.
Log conversation metadata (not content) to STREAM. If the conversation represents a significant interaction, push a summary to LTM with appropriate salience.
